name: ChatVLSC IDP and workspace reconciliation matrix
least_workspace_rule: Keep humans in one canonical thevlsc.com workspace wherever possible. Use service principals, service tokens, and connector credentials for machine access instead of adding service accounts as human workspace members.

machine_workspace.principle: Machine identities must use scoped credentials and must not be invited as normal users unless a target platform explicitly requires it.
service_identities: Cloudflare Access service token for mcp.thevlsc.com/v1*
OpenAI Platform project or app target after reauthentication
Zapier MCP connection after current action tools are exposed
tunnel-client profile using env-referenced Access headers

systems: existing Airtable ChatVLSC MCP review base

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: primary_owner
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Platform-native membership or owner/admin role evidence in the canonical thevlsc.com workspace.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: chatvlsc_agent_identity
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Confirm whether chatvlsc@thevlsc.com or chatvslc@thevlsc.com is the canonical agent identity before any grant.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: google_alias
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Confirm the correct Google account and stable provider subject/GUID before linking it to christian@thevlsc.com.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: gid_domain_identity
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Directory lookup proving the account exists, or written decision to remove it from the access plan.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: admin_domain_identity
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Confirm mailbox/user existence and intended admin role before granting app or Access admin privileges.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: apple_icloud_alias
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Stable provider subject/GUID mapped to the canonical owner identity.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: microsoft_personal_alias
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Stable Microsoft personal account subject mapped to the canonical owner identity.

human_identity_reconciliation.subject: cloud_mail_admin
human_identity_reconciliation.required_evidence: Confirm this account is mail administration only and does not need ChatVLSC MCP workspace membership.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Use one Access application/policy set for mcp.thevlsc.com/v1* and service-token credentials for automation clients.
provider_gates.required_evidence: Access application, Service Auth policy, service token ID, and authenticated MCP probe passing without storing headers.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Patch the existing ChatVLSC app registration only; do not create a duplicate app registration unless separately approved.
provider_gates.required_evidence: Application.ReadWrite.All or Application Administrator / Cloud Application Administrator rights, then successful safe executor run.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Use one OpenAI organization/project target selected through the secure connector flow.
provider_gates.required_evidence: OpenAI Platform target listing succeeds and the selected org/project is recorded without exposing keys.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Use one Zapier MCP connection for approved automations after authorization and action schema exposure.
provider_gates.required_evidence: Current-session Zapier MCP tools are exposed and a non-mutating readiness call succeeds.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Use an existing workspace/channel when identified; do not create a duplicate Slack workspace.
provider_gates.required_evidence: Target channel ID or explicit approval to create a new channel in an existing workspace.

provider_gates.least_workspace_action: Use one shared Figma file or design-system target if a design deliverable is needed.
provider_gates.required_evidence: Figma file key and approved edit scope.

unauthenticated_gate.expected_result: Cloudflare Access redirect for ChatVLSC endpoints and auth-required for Zapier without storing bodies or redirects.

access_changes_not_applied: No users were invited or joined to any workspace.
No Cloudflare Access application, policy, or service token was created.
No Entra app registration or app role was changed.
No OpenAI key, project, or ChatGPT app target was created.
No Zapier, Slack, or Figma write was performed.
next_actions: Resolve the chatvlsc/chatvslc spelling mismatch before agent access.
Resolve the redacted Google alias mismatch before Cloudflare Google IDP linking.
Confirm whether christian.gid@thevlsc.com exists or remove it from the access plan.
Create or select a Cloudflare Access service token, store credentials outside source, then run the authenticated MCP probes.
Reauthenticate OpenAI Platform before API key or ChatGPT app target work.
Expose or reconnect Zapier MCP action tools before workflow execution.
chatvlsc_surface_policy: Implement and validate on primary ChatVLSC current first. Treat mcp.thevlsc.com/v1 as RLI Assistant, with chatvlsc_dev retained only as a legacy client alias.
